title: Chugach Hosts Ceremony At AK Job Corps Center Honoring Congressman Don Young
summary: Chugach Training & Educational Solutions (CTES), a subsidiary of Chugach Alaska Corporation (Chugach), hosted a ceremony to rededicate the Alaska Job Corps Center (AKJCC) in honor of the late Congressman Don Young on June 28th Congressman Young’s career spanned five decades, during which he was a co...
